name: Payment Plan Management
description: Accounting stages tenant hardship and payment-plan review packets, monitoring checkpoints, and missed-installment escalations with approval gates before resident-facing agreements or legal/accounting actions.

stages.name: Normalize Hardship Intake
stages.description: Normalize tenant request, balance, lease, and delinquency facts before plan drafting.

steps.title: Normalize payment plan request
steps.instructions: Normalize tenant, property, unit, delinquency_account, balance, current charges, prior promises, hardship reason if provided, requested terms, lease status, eviction status, and source confidence. Missing ledger, lease, tenant, or AppFolio data must be null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize payment plan request facts and missing-data flags. No resident send, agreement, payment action, or AppFolio write.

steps.title: Review payment plan eligibility
steps.instructions: Review eligibility, eviction/legal status, owner constraints, repeat-default history, and whether a plan may be drafted.
steps.human_prompt: Review payment plan eligibility before drafting resident-facing terms.

stages.name: Draft Plan Packet
stages.description: Prepare draft-only payment plan terms and compliance caveats.

steps.title: Draft payment plan options
steps.instructions: Draft internal payment plan options, installment schedule, due dates, default triggers, late-fee caveats, resident obligations, owner/legal caveats, and missing-data notes. Draft-only; do not offer terms.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft internal payment plan options only. No resident send and no agreement.

steps.title: Review plan terms
steps.instructions: Approve, edit, hold, or reject payment plan terms before resident-facing offer, owner update, legal hold, or accounting action.
steps.human_prompt: Human approval required before payment plan terms are offered to a resident.

stages.name: Stage Agreement
stages.description: Stage approved agreement and monitoring metadata without sending or collecting.

steps.title: Stage approved payment plan
steps.instructions: Stage approved resident-facing agreement draft, installment schedule, payment instructions checklist, monitoring checkpoints, and default language for operator release. Do not send, request payment, collect money, or write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved payment plan metadata only. No resident send, payment request, collection, or AppFolio write.

steps.title: Record plan acceptance source
steps.instructions: Record whether the resident accepted, rejected, countered, or did not respond, with source and timestamp. Do not infer acceptance from silence.
steps.human_prompt: Record resident payment plan acceptance or rejection from a verified source.

stages.name: Monitor Plan
stages.description: Track installments and stage missed-payment escalation for approval.

steps.title: Track installment status
steps.instructions: Track installment due dates, received amounts, short payments, missed installments, cure status, and ledger proof. Missing payment data must be null with needs_verification; do not mark default without evidence.
steps.dispatch_body: Track payment plan installment metadata. No resident sends and no accounting writes.

steps.title: Review missed installment escalation
steps.instructions: Approve hold, reminder draft, owner update, delinquency ladder continuation, or eviction-process handoff before any escalation occurs.
steps.human_prompt: Human approval required before missed-payment reminder, owner update, legal escalation, or eviction handoff.

steps.title: Record payment plan outcome
steps.instructions: Record current plan status, proof refs, escalation decision, next checkpoint, and downstream workflow handoff needs. Do not send or write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Record internal payment plan outcome. No external sends and no AppFolio writes.
